meaning: n.狭板,梯级,棍棒,诗句vt.击穿,弄破,避开,压扁,延缓vi.穿孔,破碎
examples: We'll never be able to stop beach erosion, we can only stave it off.
There's no sense of straining to stay awake or to stave off sleep.
It won't be pretty, but it could stave off some much uglier alternatives.
The period devoted to outdoor activities, which are thought to help stave off shortsightedness?
In reaction, they are building their proprietary trading capabilities to stave off the exodus of talent.
